brand.logoLockupAriaLabel: Gacharoo logo: kangaroo mascot with a holographic trading card booster pack
brand.mascotAriaLabel: Gacharoo mascot: friendly kangaroo with a holographic booster pack
brand.homeSubtitle: Turn anything into a trading card game.
brand.homeLayoutHint: Marketing pages use a soft violet glow. The interactive demo uses a darker game canvas.

demo.headerBlurb: Open packs, reveal in order, collect rewards, then refill.
demo.packHudFree: {count, plural, one {1 free pack left} other {# free packs left}}
demo.packStatusComplete: Pack complete. Open the next one.
demo.refillHasPacks: You can keep opening without waiting.
demo.rewardEmpty: Open a pack to get rewards.
demo.footerBlurb: Gacharoo demo loop: free packs, ordered reveals, cooldowns, and rewarded refill.

auth.ageGateInfo: You must be at least 16 years old to use Gacharoo.

packs.packsAvailable: {count, plural, =0 {No packs} one {1 pack} other {# packs}} available
packs.dropRates: Drop rates: {common}% Common | {uncommon}% Uncommon | {rare}% Rare | {epic}% Epic | {legendary}% Legendary
packs.adPrompt: Watch a short ad to get an extra pack.
packs.adConsent: Ads are served by Google AdMob. They help keep Gacharoo free.
packs.dailyLimitReached: Daily ad limit reached. Come back tomorrow!
packs.coolDown: You've opened {count} packs. Want to keep going or check your collection?

battle.title: Battle Run
battle.continueAd: Watch an ad to revive with 1 heart?

import.title: Create Set
import.photoConsent: Make sure this person is okay with being in your card set. Photos can be removed at any time by request.
